name: @sovereign/web3-economy
description: GANI HYPHA — Web2+Web3+Web4+Web5 Autonomous Economy Engine powered by AI

scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:client && npm run fix:routes
scripts.fix:routes: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json',JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/api/*'],exclude:[]}));console.log('✅ _routes.json fixed: only /api/* goes to worker');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name gani-hypha-web3
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name gani-hypha-web3
